hourly.summary: Arsenal fans are feeling cautiously optimistic despite criticism of their playing style, with confidence growing about their title chances as City falters.

daily.summary: Arsenal fan sentiment shows a clear improvement throughout the day, starting with cautious and frustrated tones during the match, then shifting to relief and positivity after securing a 1-0 win against Brighton. The initial anxiety and criticism of the team's performance gave way to satisfaction with the result, particularly given Manchester City's dropped points, creating an overall positive end-of-day vibe.

weekly.summary: The weekly sentiment shows a volatile trend, starting with high euphoria following the North London derby win, then gradually declining through cautious optimism and distraction, before ending with anxious tension after the Chelsea match. Fans experienced dramatic emotional swings from celebration to frustration, reflecting the psychological toll of tight title race fixtures.
